notes: Generic synthetic statement fixture from an open-source multi-format bank-statement parser (Apache-2.0). 7 cols (Date,Description,Amount,Currency,Balance,Account,Reference); ISO dates; EUR; includes a negative amount (Rent -1200.00) alongside a positive credit (Salary); IBAN-style account DE123456789.

Generic synthetic fixture, SEMICOLON-delimited with European decimal-comma amounts and SEPARATE Credit/Debit columns (Booking Date;Details;Credit;Debit;CCY;Running Balance;IBAN;Ref). EUR; IBAN DE4455667788. Good delimiter/locale edge case. Apache-2.0 parser test data.
Generic synthetic OFX (OFXSGML v102) bank statement download; CURDEF EUR; two STMTTRN records (CREDIT Salary 1250.50, DEBIT Groceries -80.25) with FITID/NAME/MEMO. Apache-2.0 parser test data.
Generic synthetic QFX (Quicken OFXSGML) statement download; CURDEF USD; single DEBIT STMTTRN (Coffee -15.00). Apache-2.0 parser test data.

Generic synthetic SWIFT MT940 statement (:20:/:25:/:28C:/:60F:/:61:/:86:/:62F: tags); EUR; opening balance 1000,00; one credit (Salary 1250,50) and one debit (Groceries 80,25); IBAN NL91ABNA0417164300. Apache-2.0 parser test data.
Edge-case fixture: MIXED currencies in one file (USD supplier charge, CAD rent) with a currency column. 2 rows. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
Edge-case fixture: sign/direction conflict - negative amount tagged credit and positive amount tagged debit (debit_credit indicator disagrees with amount sign). 2 rows. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
Edge-case fixture: duplicate transactions sharing the same date/amount/unique_id (EDGE-DUP-001) - dedup test. Includes running balance. 2 rows. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
Edge-case fixture: very long quoted memo field containing commas and an em-dash (multi-cost-centre travel reimbursement). Quoting/overflow test. 1 row. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
Edge-case fixture: statement summary/total rows interleaved as transactions (Total debits / Total credits). Test for filtering non-transaction rows. 2 rows. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
Edge-case fixture: a genuine POS row followed by a trailing PDF-footer total row (FOOTER-TOTAL-DEBITS). Footer-stripping test. 2 rows. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
Edge-case fixture: empty balance column values (ATM withdrawal / Deposit). Missing-field handling test. 2 rows. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
Edge-case fixture: European number format - dot thousands + comma decimal, quoted ("1.250,45") - and dotted dates (15.03.2025). Locale-parsing test. 2 rows. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
Edge-case fixture: ambiguous DD/MM vs MM/DD dates (01/03/2025, 02/03/2025). Date-format inference test. 2 rows. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.

Edge-case fixture labelled for a leading UTF-8 BOM (row memo states 'Contains BOM at start'); note the file as served over raw begins directly with the header bytes (no BOM present in the served copy). 1 row. Zera Books CC BY 4.0.
